get.summary: Get all FAQs by knowledge base with pagination support
get.description: Retrieves FAQs for a knowledge base. Supports pagination using limit and lastFaqId parameters.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of FAQs returned

post.summary: Create a new FAQ inside knowledge base

put.summary: Update an existing knowledge base FAQ

delete.summary: Delete an existing knowledge base FAQ

get.summary: Get all trained page links by knowledge base

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: query to filter on url links

post.summary: Start crawling and discover pages for training

get.summary: Get crawling status for the latest operation

post.summary: Train discovered website pages and ingest into the knowledge base

200.description: Knowledge base by ID retrieved successfully

get.summary: Get all knowledge bases for a location by location Id (paginated)

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: search query for knowledge base name

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of knowledge bases to return

parameters.name: lastKnowledgeBaseId
parameters.description: ID of the last knowledge base from the previous page (for pagination)

post.summary: Create a new knowledge base (max 15 knowledge bases per location)

bearer.name: Authorization
bearer.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access.name: Authorization
Location-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Agency-Access.name: Authorization
Agency-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency (OR) Private Integration Token of Agency.

message.example: Invalid token: access token is invalid

updatedAt.description: Date when FAQ was last updated

count.description: Total count of all FAQs in the knowledge base

lastFaqId.description: Last FAQ ID for pagination (use as lastFaqId in next request)

hasMore.description: Whether there are more FAQs available

question.example: What is the capital of France?

answer.example: The capital of France is Paris.

question.example: What is the capital of France?

answer.example: The capital of France is Paris.

success.description: Success status of the update operation
Success status of the delete operation

url.description: The actual URL that was crawled

status.description: Current processing status of the URL

locationId.description: Location ID associated with this URL

knowledgeBaseId.description: Knowledge base ID this URL belongs to

content.description: URL to the stored content file

contentEditedByUser.description: Whether the content was edited by user

count.description: Total count of URLs in the knowledge base

urls.description: Array of crawled URLs with their details

activeCount.description: Total count of all active knowledge bases
